name: 04-30-remove-easysdd-migrate-to-trellis
title: Remove easysdd and migrate legacy notes to Trellis
description: Migrate remaining easysdd notes into Trellis task artifacts, remove legacy easysdd directory, and clear active references.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed 2026-05-02. Migrated legacy workflow notes to Trellis and removed the old easysdd directory. Fresh review passed: both relevant Trellis tasks validate, easysdd/ is absent, and active-reference grep excluding migration/audit/journal/tooling history returns no matches. No product runtime changes.
